name: Knowledge Worker
description: Individual building a personal knowledge base

name: Data Ownership
description: Users want full local control over their notes

name: Frictionless Note-Taking
description: Capture and link ideas with minimal friction

name: Local-First Principle
description: Data lives on the device; cloud is optional

name: Offline Capability
description: The app MUST work fully without a network connection

name: Plugin Extensibility
description: Third parties can extend the app via a plugin API

name: Note to Insight
description: Capture note then link then surface insight

name: Personal Knowledge Management
description: The end-user PKM service Obsidian delivers

name: Linking and Tagging
description: Creating wiki-links and tags between notes

name: Vault
description: A folder of notes forming a knowledge base

name: Plugin Runtime
description: Sandbox that loads community and core plugins

name: Graph View
description: Interactive node-link visualisation of the vault

name: Search Service
description: Full-text and tag search across the vault

name: Obsidian Publish
description: Optional service to publish notes as a website

name: Markdown Vault
description: On-disk collection of .md files and attachments

name: Encrypted Sync Snapshot
description: Versioned encrypted copy of the vault for sync

name: Local Filesystem
description: The device file system holding the vault

name: Electron Runtime
description: Chromium plus Node runtime for the desktop app

name: CodeMirror Editor
description: The text editor engine inside the app
